name: CloudScale Solutions
description: Enterprise cloud infrastructure provider specialising in high-availability hosting, CDN, and managed Kubernetes. Known for rapid onboarding and competitive pricing.

name: NovaTech Infrastructure
description: Global infrastructure-as-a-service provider with data centres in 15 countries. Offers managed databases, compute, and networking with 99.99% SLA.

description: Specialised hosting provider for financial services and healthcare. SOC 2 Type II certified, HIPAA compliant, with dedicated account management.

name: StackBridge Corp
description: Full-stack DevOps and infrastructure provider offering CI/CD, container orchestration, and observability platforms. Strong focus on developer experience.

name: AegisCloud Partners
description: Boutique cloud consulting and managed services firm. Expertise in migration, cost optimisation, and multi-cloud strategy for mid-market enterprises.
